title: Plate Scale Tn5 Based Tagmentation Library Prep Protocol
author: Cade Mirchandani

steps.title: Remove oligos Tn5ME-A, Tn5ME-B, Tn5ME-R, and...
steps.instruction: Remove oligos Tn5ME-A, Tn5ME-B, Tn5ME-R, and Tn5 enzyme mix from freezer. Thaw primers, mix by vortexing and spin. Keep Tn5 enzyme On ice . Turn on 95 °C thermocycler.

steps.title: In separate PCR tubes combine
steps.instruction: In separate PCR tubes combine: 7 µL Tn5ME-A + 7 µL Tn5ME-R = AR oligo ( 14 µL ) 7 µL Tn5ME-B + 7 µL Tn5ME-R = BR oligo ( 14 µL )

steps.title: Place oligos in thermocycler on the following program
steps.instruction: Place oligos in thermocycler on the following program: 1. 95 °C x 00:05:00 2. 25 °C x -0.1 °C /sec 3. 4 °C x ∞

steps.title: In separate 1.5 mL tubes combine the following
steps.instruction: In separate 1.5 mL tubes combine the following: 13 µL AR oligo + 91 µL Tn5 = Tn5-AR ( 104 µL ) 13 µL BR oligo + 91 µL Tn5 = Tn5-BR ( 104 µL ) Mix by pipetting gently.

steps.title: Incubate at Room temperature for 01:00:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at Room temperature for 01:00:00 .

steps.title: Preheat thermocycler to 55 °C
steps.instruction: Preheat thermocycler to 55 °C

steps.title: In new 2 mL tube prepare Tn5 Reaction Master Mix
steps.instruction: In new 2 mL tube prepare Tn5 Reaction Master Mix: %s %s 900uL H2O 4.5uL 400uL 5x TAPS buffer 2uL 400uL 40% PEG 2uL 200uL Tn5 mix 1uL DNA (10ng/uL) 1uL 1900uL mix Mix by inverting. Aliquot 18 µL of master mix to each well of tagmentation plate. Seal with foil and spin.

steps.title: Incubate in thermocycler 00:08:00 at 55 °C
steps.instruction: Incubate in thermocycler 00:08:00 at 55 °C . Remove plate from thermocycler and immediately place On ice .

steps.title: Carefully remove film and add 5 µL 0
steps.instruction: Carefully remove film and add 5 µL 0.2% SDS (prepared in a strip tube). Seal with new film and incubate for 00:10:00 at Room temperature

steps.title: Remove KAPA HiFi dNTPs and Fidelity...
steps.instruction: Remove KAPA HiFi dNTPs and Fidelity 5X buffer from freezer and thaw, vortex, and spin. Index primer plates should be thawed and spun down. KAPA HiFi PCR enzyme should only be out of the freezer briefly.

steps.title: In a 2 mL tube prepare...
steps.instruction: In a 2 mL tube prepare PCR Master Mix %s %s Mix by inverting and spin. Store On ice .

steps.title: Prepare PCR plate by adding the...
steps.instruction: Prepare PCR plate by adding the following to each well in new 96 well plate: 2 µL combined index primers ( 1 µL 5uM forward & 1 µL 5uM reverse). 5 µL tagmentation product from tagmentation plate. 18 µL PCR Master Mix Be careful that plate positions match. Make sure to record index primers used.

steps.title: Seal PCR plate with foil, spin,...
steps.instruction: Seal PCR plate with foil, spin, and place in thermocyclers for the following program: %s %s

steps.title: When complete freeze at -20 °C...
steps.instruction: When complete freeze at -20 °C Overnight or proceed to cleanup.

steps.title: In a 1
steps.instruction: In a 1.5 mL tube, add 2.5 µL from each well of PCR plate, total 240 µL crude pooled library. Prepare ZYMO Select-A-Size DNA Clean and Concentrator Kit.

steps.title: Prepare tagmentation plate by aliquoting 2...
steps.instruction: Prepare tagmentation plate by aliquoting 2 µL ( 10-20 ng ) gDNA to each well of new 96 well plate.

steps.title: Check concentration of 8-10 randomly selected wells
steps.instruction: Check concentration of 8-10 randomly selected wells. Desired concentration on Qubit is 15-75ng/uL.

steps.title: Add 700 µL of DNA Wash Buffer to the column
steps.instruction: Add 700 µL of DNA Wash Buffer to the column. Centrifuge at 10,000 x g for 00:00:30 . Discard the flow-through.

steps.title: Add 200 µL of DNA Wash Buffer to the column
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of DNA Wash Buffer to the column. Centrifuge at 10,000 x g for 00:01:00 . Discard the Collection Tube.

steps.title: Transfer the column to a new 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the column to a new 1.5 mL tube, add 22 µL (This number can be varied based on the concentration of the pooled library) of DNA Elution Buffer directly to the column matrix, and incubate for 00:01:00 at Room temperature . Centrifuge at 10,000 x g for 00:00:30

steps.title: Steps 19
steps.instruction: Steps 19.1 - 19.4 are to be done for each prepared binding mixture.

steps.title: In order to not exceed the...
steps.instruction: In order to not exceed the capacity of the Zymo-Spin IC-S column, split the pool into two replicates: In 2 new 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tubes add the following: 100 µL crude pooled library 500 µL Select-a-Size DNA Binding Buffer Mix thoroughly by pipetting the entire volume up and down 5 times

steps.title: Transfer the binding mixture to a...
steps.instruction: Transfer the binding mixture to a Zymo-Spin IC-S Column in a Collection Tube. Centrifuge at 10,000 x g for 00:00:30 . Discard the flow-through.

steps.title: Check and record concentration of purified pool replicate on Qubit
steps.instruction: Check and record concentration of purified pool replicate on Qubit.

steps.title: Purified pools can be stored at -20 °C
steps.instruction: Purified pools can be stored at -20 °C .

steps.title: Cast a 1
steps.instruction: Cast a 1.2% agarose gel (TBE; 0.5cm thick). While gel is solidifying, prepare: NEB 6X gel loading dye NEB 100bp DNA ladder NEB Monarch DNA Gel Extraction Kit 3. Thaw purified pools on bench and quick spin. Ensure you add the appropriate amount of nucleic acid gel stain via pre-loading, precasting, or post-staining.

steps.title: To prevent overloading gel lanes and...
steps.instruction: To prevent overloading gel lanes and minimize gel thickness, divide each pool replicate between two PCR tubes. Aliquot 10 µL from each pool replicate into two new PCR tubes, resulting in a total of 4 PCR tubes. To each tube, add 2 µL 6X gel loading dye.

steps.title: In a new PCR tube, prepare DNA ladder by combining
steps.instruction: In a new PCR tube, prepare DNA ladder by combining: 4 µL Molecular biology grade water 1 µL 100bp DNA Ladder 1 µL 6X gel loading dye

steps.title: Load each pool and ladder on...
steps.instruction: Load each pool and ladder on agarose gel Run gel at 85 V for approx. 01:00:00

steps.title: Prepare 4 1
steps.instruction: Prepare 4 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tubes. Label each, and record their weights.

steps.title: Extract gel slices from lanes the pools were run on
steps.instruction: Extract gel slices from lanes the pools were run on. Desired size range is between ~450-800bp. Place extracted slice into new, labeled 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Re-weigh microcentrifuge tubes with gel slices...
steps.instruction: Re-weigh microcentrifuge tubes with gel slices and record difference to find gel slice weight.

steps.title: Steps 28
steps.instruction: Steps 28.1 - 28.6 are to be done for each extracted gel slice.

steps.title: If the gel slice is greater...
steps.instruction: If the gel slice is greater than 150 mg , add 3 volumes of Gel Dissolving Buffer to the gel slice. Else, add 4 volumes.

steps.title: Incubate at 50 °C for approx
steps.instruction: Incubate at 50 °C for approx. 00:10:00 , inverting periodically until the gel slice is completely dissolved.

steps.title: Insert the column into the collection...
steps.instruction: Insert the column into the collection tube and load the sample onto the column. Spin at 16,000 x g for 00:01:00 Discard the flow-through

steps.title: Re-insert column into collection tube
steps.instruction: Re-insert column into collection tube. Add 200 µL DNA Wash Buffer Spin at 16,000 x g 00:01:00 Discard the flow-through. Repeat once .

steps.title: Transfer column to a new 1
steps.instruction: Transfer column to a new 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Add 16 µL of DNA Elution...
steps.instruction: Add 16 µL of DNA Elution Buffer to the center of the matrix. Incubate for 00:01:00 at Room temperature Spin at 16,000 x g for 00:01:00 to elute DNA.

steps.title: Pool all 4 elutions in to a new 1
steps.instruction: Pool all 4 elutions in to a new 1.5 mL tube. This is the final pool.

steps.title: Check final pool on Qubit and Agilent Tapestation
steps.instruction: Check final pool on Qubit and Agilent Tapestation.
